html:
Exclusive to:

The Demolition Permit is a craftable Item exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found in the Renovate Tab and requires 10 Oincs to obtain. It can also be bought at the Swinesbury City Hall for 10 Oincs.

By using the Demolition Permit on a Door that connects to another room in the Slanty Shanty, one is able to demolish this adjacent room. Demolishing a room returns all Items that were dropped on the ground within it as well as half of the Crafting resources of all Structures and Furniture that were built within it, as if they had been Hammered. Any living mobs who can't be held in inventory within the room will be killed and drop their loot. The Demolition Permit is consumed in the process. The door remains, but is now locked and can only be made usable again with another House Expansion Permit.

It is not possible to demolish the room that contains the entry and exit of the Slanty Shanty.

Trivia

  • The Demolition Permit can also be crafted using 1 Tenpiece Oincs or 1 Centapiece Oinc. If using Centapiece Oinc, one will be returned 9 Tenpiece Oincs.

"demolition_permit"
“Time to demonstrate some demolition.”
–Wilson
“Burn! Burn it all down!”
–Willow
“Wolfgang can punch walls down now.”
–Wolfgang
“Why bother building in the first place?”
–Wendy
“FOR REPROGRAMMING MY HOME”
–WX-78
“A permit for renovations. Perhaps a non-fiction section.”
–Wickerbottom
“Want to help me chop down some walls, Lucy?”
–Woodie
“I normally don't need a license for destruction.”
–Maxwell
“A document allowing me to destroy a building so I can inevitably rebuild.”
–Wagstaff
“Permissiön tö dö battle with my höuse!”
–Wigfrid
“This paper says it's okay for us to to wreck stuff.”
–Webber
“Seems like a shame to wreck all that work I did.”
–Walani
“A permit to break a few eggs.”
–Warly
“Me rooms be headin' fer a careenin'.”
–Woodlegs
“NOW WILBA TAKE ARMS AGAINST A SEA OF RUBBLE”
–Wilba
“Break rooms?”
–Wormwood
“I have to admit, it's going to be fun smashing down all those walls.”
–Wheeler
The Demolition Permit is a craftable Item exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found in the Renovate Tab and requires 10 Oincs to obtain. It can also be bought at the Swinesbury City Hall for 10 Oincs.
By using the Demolition Permit on a Door that connects to another room in the Slanty Shanty, one is able to demolish this adjacent room. Demolishing a room returns all Items that were dropped on the ground within it as well as half of the Crafting resources of all Structures and Furniture that were built within it, as if they had been Hammered. Any living mobs who can't be held in inventory within the room will be killed and drop their loot. The Demolition Permit is consumed in the process. The door remains, but is now locked and can only be made usable again with another House Expansion Permit.
It is not possible to demolish the room that contains the entry and exit of the Slanty Shanty.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Demolition Permit can also be crafted using 1 Tenpiece Oincs or 1 Centapiece Oinc. If using Centapiece Oinc, one will be returned 9 Tenpiece Oincs.

The '''Demolition Permit''' is a craftable [[Item]] exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. It is found in the [[Renovate Tab]] and requires 10 [[Oinc]]s to obtain. It can also be bought at the [[Swinesbury City Hall]] for 10 Oincs.

By using the Demolition Permit on a [[Doors Tab|Door]] that connects to another room in the [[Slanty Shanty]], one is able to demolish this adjacent room. Demolishing a room returns all [[Items]] that were dropped on the ground within it as well as half of the [[Crafting]] resources of all [[Structures]] and [[Renovate Tab|Furniture]] that were built within it, as if they had been [[Hammer]]ed. Any living mobs who can't be held in inventory within the room will be killed and drop their loot. The Demolition Permit is consumed in the process. The door remains, but is now locked and can only be made usable again with another [[House Expansion Permit]].

It is not possible to demolish the room that contains the entry and exit of the Slanty Shanty.

== {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==

* The Demolition Permit can also be crafted using 1 [[Oinc|Tenpiece Oinc]]s or 1 [[Centapiece Oinc]]. If using Centapiece Oinc, one will be returned 9 Tenpiece Oincs.
